prestazioni: Engine: S70/2 6.1L V12 (derived from the McLaren F1's S70/2 but detuned to ~580 HP for endurance racing) – full rebuild with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.0:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from VAC Motorsports to handle 9,000 RPM redline with 10W-60 Motul 300V Competition oil.

Forced Induction: Custom-built twin-turbo system using Garrett GT4202R turbos (86mm inducer, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and a custom air-to-water intercooler setup (PWR Racing) with a 10L ice reservoir for 24-hour race endurance cooling. Boost targets: 1.8 bar (26 psi) on 102-octane race fuel (VP Racing C16).

Drivetrain: Xtrac P1046 6-speed sequential gearbox with a Sachs Racing twin-disc carbon clutch (240mm) and a Quaife ATB differential (85% lock). Custom half-shafts from GKN Driveline with CV joints rated for 1,200 Nm torque. Rear subframe reinforced with 4130 chromoly tubing (fabricated by HRE Performance).
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon fiber body kit by BMW Motorsport Classic (replica of the 1999 Le Mans-winning LMR), including a 3D-printed front splitter with integrated dive planes (tested in Sauber’s wind tunnel) and a rear diffuser with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via cockpit switch).

Wheels: BBS LM-R II (18x12 front, 18x13 rear) with center-lock adapters, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (345/680R18 front, 385/680R18 rear). Custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) by H&R to optimize track width for Nürburgring Nordschleife.

Interior: Full FIA-spec roll cage by Matter Motorsport (chromoly, TIG-welded) with Sparco Pro 2000 seats (carbon fiber shell) and a custom carbon fiber dash by Status Racing, featuring a MoTeC C187 dash logger with GPS lap timing and a Bosch Motorsport ABS controller (integrated with the S70/2’s Motronic MS 1.7 ECU).
